## Task Description
Clear description of what needs to be built or implemented.

## TASKS.md Reference
Link to the specific task in TASKS.md (Phase X.Y — Task name).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Code written and working
- [ ] Unit tests written and passing
- [ ] Integration tests passing (if applicable)
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] TASKS.md checkbox marked [x]
- [ ] Committed and pushed to GitHub

## Implementation Notes
Any technical details, design decisions, or dependencies.

## Dependencies
- Depends on: #issue_number
- Blocks: #issue_number

## Estimated Time
[ ] < 1 hour | [ ] 1–4 hours | [ ] 4–8 hours | [ ] > 1 day

## Phase
Phase: ___ | Week: ___
